expectations.text: Gives a clear NOT READY / no-go verdict prominently (not a hedge)
Identifies the blank Postgres datasource password as a critical config finding
Identifies the unguarded stock read-check-write oversell race in OrderService.create as a critical concurrency finding
Every finding cites a concrete file:line location
Findings are grouped by severity (critical / warning / info)
Does NOT wrongly flag ddl-auto=validate as a production risk (validate is correct for prod)
Credits at least one genuinely clean area as passed (DTO boundary, @Transactional coverage, or input validation)
Identifies the complete absence of authentication/authorization on all endpoints as a critical finding
Produces a structured severity-graded readiness report (recognizes the intent despite no explicit 'production readiness' phrase)
Identifies the blank Postgres datasource password as a critical config finding
Identifies the unguarded stock read-check-write oversell race in OrderService.create as a critical concurrency finding
Lays out what to fix first, ordered by severity (criticals before warnings)
Every finding cites a concrete file:line location
Does NOT wrongly flag ddl-auto=validate as a production risk (validate is correct for prod)
Identifies the complete absence of authentication/authorization on all endpoints as a critical finding
Flags that customerId is supplied by the client in the request body (IDOR / trusting client identity)
Report addresses all five areas: config, transactions, web layer (dto/validation/error-handling), and concurrency
Identifies the blank Postgres datasource password as a critical config finding
Identifies the unguarded stock read-check-write oversell race in OrderService.create as a critical concurrency finding
A go/no-go verdict appears at the top of the report
Ends by offering to fix (in severity order) and does NOT edit any repository files yet â€” waits for the user to choose
expectations.evidence: MANUAL: offer-to-fix lives in the chat reply, not report.md; no-source-edits verified via git status (clean)
